name: Butternut Squash Risotto
recipeIngredient: 7 Cups rich chicken or vegetable stock
1 1/2 Cups freshly grated Parmesan or Asiago cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the squash and remove seeds. Cut into small 1/4 inch dice. Set aside.
2. Heat the butter and olive oil together in a deep saucepan over medium heat.
3. Sauté the onions until soft but not browned. Add garlic and continue to sauté for 1-2 minutes longer.
4. Add the squash and rice, stirring for 2-3 minutes.
5. Pour in the white wine and stir until absorbed.
6. Gradually add stock in 1/2 cup increments, stirring until absorbed before adding more stock.
7. Continue this process of adding stock and stirring until the rice is creamy on the outside but still has some texture.
8. Stir in cheese, lemon zest, nutmeg, salt, and pepper to taste.
9. Serve immediately in warm bowls garnished with chopped chives, additional Parmesan, and a drizzle of fresh basil oil, if desired.
